metadata.description: Multi-agent software engineering orchestrator. One command runs database → backend → frontend → testing → security → git, with per-agent knowledge bases and cross-domain contract validation.

plugins.name: software-engineer
plugins.description: Automated full-stack software engineering. Routes any dev task through specialized domain agents (database, backend, frontend, testing, calls, bridge, git) in dependency order, asking plain-English questions first. Orchestrator runs on the host's main model; mechanical sub-agents run on cheaper models. No API keys or local Ollama required.
